name: Oriental Spaghetti with Cucumber and Spicy Peanut Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon dried hot pepper flakes, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the peanut butter, soy sauce, lemon juice, minced garlic, hot pepper flakes, and sugar in a bowl.
2. Gradually add hot water while stirring until the mixture is smooth.
3. Cook spaghetti according to package instructions.
4. Drain the spaghetti and toss with the peanut sauce until well coated.
5. Slice cucumber thinly and mix it into the spaghetti dish.
6. Turn off heat when serving.
